statement: The agent-skill supply-chain attack surface is empirically real and active (not hypothetical), validating the problem agent-enterprise targets even if the tooling is not novel.

evidence.quote: Scanned 3,984 agent skills from ClawHub... 36.82% (1,467 skills) have at least one security flaw... 76 malicious payloads designed for credential theft and data exfiltration.
production agent platforms... will execute arbitrary shell commands and curl requests embedded as invisible instructions inside agent skill markdown files, surviving any visual code review.

falsifier: If independent re-scans found near-zero malicious skills, the threat's materiality would be in doubt.
